title: pyrenacantha klaineana var. congolana
intro: Pyrenacantha klaineana var. congolana is a plant species, commonly known as a type of flowering plant within the family Icacinaceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimalarial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating malaria, and relieving respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea form or dried and powdered for use in various remedies, although the specific methods may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
